title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Inter-services Organisations (Command, Control and Discipline) Act, 2023. (2) It shall come into force on such date1 as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint.
footnote: 1. 10th May, 2024, Vide notification No. S.R.O. 13(E), dated 08th May, 2024, see Gazette of India, Part II, sec. 4.
